name: Interrupts
perPoint: Backup auto-kick of dangerous casts (weak — a real interrupter spec is the answer)
starved: Dangerous casts land and stack to a wipe

name: Positioning
perPoint: Avoidable event hits its target at 60% - 18% per point

name: Cooldowns
perPoint: +4%/pt party damage in boss burn windows; -10%/pt spike damage taken

name: Kill Order
perPoint: +6%/pt effective party DPS on trash; sets the kill plan
starved: Adds live too long, healer OOM
